name: WASTE MANAGEMENT INC
summary: Waste Management Inc. (WM) is a leading provider of comprehensive waste management environmental services in North America. The company offers collection, transfer, disposal, and recycling services for municipal solid waste, hazardous waste, and other materials. WM operates landfills, transfer stations, recycling facilities, and waste-to-energy plants, serving residential, commercial, industrial, and municipal customers.

products.name: Waste Collection Services
products.description: Residential, commercial, and industrial solid waste collection services.

products.name: Landfill Disposal
products.description: Disposal of municipal solid waste and other materials at owned and operated landfills.

products.name: Recycling Services
products.description: Processing and recycling of materials at recycling facilities.

products.name: Transfer Station Services
products.description: Transfer and transport of waste materials between collection and disposal sites.

products.name: Waste-to-Energy
products.description: Conversion of waste materials into energy at specialized facilities.

products.name: Hazardous Waste Services
products.description: Collection, treatment, and disposal of hazardous waste materials.
